## FiltersInjectionMixin class

Mixin to share filters injection logic.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class FiltersInjectionMixin extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [filters](./x-components.filtersinjectionmixin.filters.md) |  | Filter\[\] | The list of filters to be rendered as slots. |
|  [injectedFilters](./x-components.filtersinjectionmixin.injectedfilters.md) |  | Filter\[\] | The injected filters array. |
|  [parentId?](./x-components.filtersinjectionmixin.parentid.md) |  | Filter\['id'\] | <i>(Optional)</i> This prop is used in the <code>HierarchicalFilter</code> component and only in that case. It is necessary to make the <code>renderedFilters</code> to return only the filters of each level of the hierarchy. |
